pending.body: finding_summary: `tests/unit/milestone_store_integration_test.rs:906-994` does not actually verify the promised "no partial state" guarantee. The test only asserts the final repaired snapshot/journal after it calls `read_journal()`, so it would still pass if `load_snapshot()` exposed the torn `status.json` first and the later journal read performed the repair. affected_files: ["tests/unit/milestone_store_integration_test.rs:906-994"] remediation_hint: Assert immediately after `load_snapshot()` that the pending sidecar is already gone, or otherwise verify that the first plain snapshot read masks or repairs the torn cross-file commit before any subsequent journal read.
